display_text: Centaur Aghanim's Scepter: Work Horse — Grants Stampede benefits passively and allows casting Hitch a Ride on an ally. This upgrade transforms Centaur into a mobile repositioning tool, countering enemy focus-fire by enabling rapid ally relocation during fights.
search_text: Centaur Aghanim Scepter Hitch a Ride ally repositioning anti-focus Stampede

display_text: Centaur Aghanim's Shard: Double Edge — Slows enemy heroes and grants temporary Strength per hero hit. This upgrade counters kiting and physical damage dealers by enhancing Centaur's tankiness and crowd control in prolonged engagements.
search_text: Centaur Aghanim Shard Double Edge slow Strength anti-kiting physical damage
